scope_boundary: All five deliberation arms ended at 0/60 correct; adaptive stopping exhausted five candidates on every request, so utility did not improve and corruption reduction was not estimable on an initially-correct case.
transition_reason: All five deliberation arms ended at 0/60 correct; adaptive stopping exhausted five candidates on every request, so utility did not improve and corruption reduction was not estimable on an initially-correct case.
required_artifacts: a workload with correct and incorrect initial candidates
adaptive benefit at a matched real budget
independently assessed evaluator and production transfer
negative_results: no deliberation arm produced one correct final answer
adaptive stopping never stopped before budget exhaustion
the fifteen historical harms remain regression logic rather than new held-out evidence
downgrade_triggers: raw bundle or artifact replay failure
core support promotion without a distinct accepted upward transition
promotion_burden: a workload with correct and incorrect initial candidates; adaptive benefit at a matched real budget; replicated corruption reduction; independently assessed evaluator and production transfer
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; no external human review requested or claimed
acceptance_blockers: a workload with correct and incorrect initial candidates
adaptive benefit at a matched real budget
independently assessed evaluator and production transfer
non_claims: does not promote any affected chapter-core claim above argument
